articles.headline: Autodesk signs strategic collaboration with Amazon Web Services
articles.summary: Autodesk’s partnership with AWS could accelerate cloud-native CAD workflows, generative design, and enterprise AI offerings. For businesses, that signals potential changes in how design software is delivered, scaled, and monetized, with knock-on effects for IT planning and software procurement.

articles.headline: Apple approves Poke as first AI agent on Messages for Business
articles.summary: Apple’s approval of an AI agent on Messages for Business suggests a new customer-service channel for companies using Apple’s business messaging platform. This could affect support operations, automation strategy, and how firms handle inbound customer interactions.

articles.headline: Weekly Intelligence Report highlights ransomware, vulnerabilities, and data leaks
articles.summary: CYFIRMA’s weekly report describes ransomware and leak activity affecting a transportation and logistics company in Singapore and a construction company in Japan. Those sectors are operationally important for many businesses, so the report is a reminder that supply-chain disruption and third-party cyber risk remain immediate business concerns.[5]
